# Extend Prisma schema with all domain models

### Description
Add 6 domain models to the Prisma schema and run migration.

### Checklist
- [ ] Activity model (title, description, theme, category, date, materials, instructions)
- [ ] Policy model (centerId, title, content, category, effectiveDate, version)
- [ ] Document model (title, url, summary, tags, vector embedding)
- [ ] Knowledge model (title, content, tags, isPublic, createdBy)
- [ ] MattimeIdea model (title, description, ageGroup, materials, steps)
- [ ] SpecialNeedsResource model (title, content, category, tags, embedding)
- [ ] Run `npx prisma migrate dev`
